name: Kristen Schaal
blurb: She built her reputation on the New York alternative comedy scene, won the Andy Kaufman Award, and appeared as the stalker fan Mel on Flight of the Conchords and as a senior correspondent on The Daily Show.
bio: Kristen Schaal is an American actress, comedian, and writer known for her distinctive high-pitched voice and offbeat, character-driven stand-up. She built her reputation on the New York alternative comedy scene, won the Andy Kaufman Award, and appeared as the stalker fan Mel on Flight of the Conchords and as a senior correspondent on The Daily Show. She voices Louise Belcher on Bob's Burgers and Mabel Pines on Gravity Falls.

timeline.ev: Wins Best Alternative Comedian at the Aspen comedy festival
Begins playing Mel on Flight of the Conchords
Debuts as a correspondent on The Daily Show
Begins voicing Louise Belcher on Bob's Burgers
Begins voicing Mabel Pines on Gravity Falls

accolades: Winner of the Andy Kaufman Award, 2006
Best Alternative Comedian at the 2006 HBO US Comedy Arts Festival
Annie Award winner for voice acting on Bob's Burgers
